title: Telegram webhook request bodies read before secret validation (unauthenticated resource exhaustion)
description: The Telegram webhook HTTP handler reads and parses the full JSON request body (up to 1 MB, with a 30-second timeout) before checking the X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header. An unauthenticated attacker can send large or slow-drip request bodies to exhaust server resources because the expensive body-reading operation precedes the lightweight secret token comparison.
